Enkrpt Wallet

Founded in 2015 and trusted by millions, with over 24 million wallets created across 190 countries, Enkrpt Wallet is the most popular and secure self-custodial multicurrency Crypto Wallet.

Web Wallet
Launch now

Send your cryptocurrency, including BTC, ETH, USDT, and more, anytime and anywhere from your mobile device or desktop.

Instant transactions — Complete your Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, and other crypto transactions instantly with no delays. Experience seamless and fast crypto transfers.

Our self-custodial wallet employs strong encryption to ensure the highest level of security for your assets.

Multichain Cryptocurrency Wallet

A leading self-custody multicurrency wallet solution that allows you to easily manage all your cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, Monero, XRP, Solana, and many more. This makes it the best multi-chain wallet for crypto enthusiasts.

Crypto & Web3 on Mobile and Desktop

Manage your crypto across mobile and desktop with easy synchronization. Send, receive, and swap BTC, ETH, XRP and other supported assets effortlessly. Stay in control of your portfolio and explore Web3 features anytime, anywhere.

Secure Bitcoin and Crypto Wallet

Enkrpt Wallet prioritizes user security and anonymity. Our system undergoes regular audits to ensure complete data integrity. Key principles include:

  • Private keys always remain on your device
  • All data is encrypted for maximum protection
  • No KYC required
  • Anonymity guaranteed
  • Hardware wallets support
